deliverables.title: Refiner Product Overview
deliverables.audience: Technical buyers, engineering leaders, and delivery managers
deliverables.goal: Explain how Refiner turns fragmented delivery work into one governed operating surface.

sections.title: The delivery problem
sections.focus: Fragmented Jira, Confluence, research, and release work

sections.title: Workflow router
sections.focus: Explicit workflow choice across analysis, research, solving, and delivery

sections.title: Governed service surface
sections.focus: Jobs, auth, RAG, MCP, voice, tokens, and metrics

sections.title: Commercial close
sections.focus: Why technical buyers should book a focused briefing

must_include: governed delivery rather than generic automation
avoid: claims that humans are removed from the process

deliverables.title: Refiner Training Walkthrough
deliverables.audience: Operators, internal enablement, and implementation teams
deliverables.goal: Show how to navigate Refiner from workflow selection through output review and governance checks.
deliverables.cta: Use the approved workflow pack and stay inside the control surface

sections.title: Workflow selection
sections.focus: When to use analysis, research, solver, or delivery

sections.title: Review and verification
sections.focus: How to inspect generated artefacts and governance evidence

sections.title: Operational controls
sections.focus: Auth, jobs, tokens, voice, and API docs

avoid: pure UI-tour content with no operator judgement
